No external data or runtime logic is involved.\n\n- **Sinks & Flows:** No untrusted data flows into sensitive functions; the flow is straightforward: static data used in contract deployment and interaction.\n\n- **Anomalies & Analysis:** The code appears boilerplate, with no suspicious constructs, backdoors, or dynamic logic. The large static strings are typical for contract factories.\n\n- **Conclusion & Confidence:** High confidence (0.9), no malware, obfuscation, or security risk. The assessment is consistent.\n\n**Verdict:** No issues.
